zh.Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素可安莫林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Bilton於1407年出生在英國素可安莫林時，他的父親John Bilton16歲，母親Jane Stirling16歲。他於1432年與Margaret Cook在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年在英國英格蘭素可安莫林享年26歲。

zh-hans.Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰素可安莫林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Bilton于1407年出生在英国素可安莫林时，他的父亲John Bilton16岁，母亲Jane Stirling16岁。他于1432年与Margaret Cook在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1433年在英国英格兰素可安莫林享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire called Bilton, from an Old English personal name Billa + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There is also a Bilton in Warwickshire, of which the first element is probably Old English beolone ‘henbane’ (compare Belton ).

variants.name: Belton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Belton, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Suffolk. The first element, bel, is of uncertain origin; the second is Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
English: occasionally a variant of   Bilton  , a habitational name from Bilton in Warwickshire.
Irish: from the Norman name Weldon , relatively common in Ireland, which has sometimes been Gaelicized as de Bhéalatún and re-Anglicized as Veldon and Belton.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Bilton was born in 1407, in Angmering, Sussex, England, his father, John Bilton, was 16 and his mother, Jane Stirling, was 16. He married Margaret Cook in 1432, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1433, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Bilton est né en 1407, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Bilton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Jane Stirling, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cook en 1432, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1433, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Bilton 1407 in Angmering, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Bilton 16 und seine Mutter Jane Stirling 16. Er hat 1432 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Margaret Cook geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1433 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bilton è nato il nel 1407 nel Angmering, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Bilton, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Jane Stirling, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cook nel 1432, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1433, nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Biltonが1407年にイギリススセックスアングメリングで生まれた時，父John Biltonは16歳，母Jane Stirlingは16歳であった。1432年にイギリスイギリススセックスでMargaret Cookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1433年にイギリスイギリススセックスアングメリングで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Bilton(이)가 1407년 영국 수세스 앤그머잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bilton(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Stirling(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Margaret Cook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bilton nasceu em 1407, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bilton, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Jane Stirling, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cook em 1432, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1433, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Bilton родился в 1407 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bilton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Stirling, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cook в 1432 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1433 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Bilton nació en 1407, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bilton, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Jane Stirling, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margaret Cook en 1432, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1433, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años.
